This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] vertical-lr: Right/Left keys navigate as primary axis
  assert_equals: ArrowRight should move to the next option. expected Element node <option class="two">two</option> but got Element node <select id="vertical-lr" class="vertical-lr">\n  <option c...
[FAIL] vertical-rl: Left/Right keys navigate as primary axis (block-flipped)
  assert_equals: ArrowLeft should move to the next option. expected Element node <option class="two">two</option> but got Element node <select id="vertical-rl" class="vertical-rl">\n  <option c...

  assert_equals: ArrowLeft should move to the next option. expected Element node <option class="two">two</option> but got Element node <select id="sideways-rl" class="sideways-rl">\n  <option c...
Harness: the test ran to completion.
